name: Lifeway Foods, Inc.
summary: Lifeway Foods, Inc. is a food and beverage company that produces and sells kefir and other cultured dairy products. The company markets these products to consumers through retail channels. Lifeway is subject to commodity pricing, competition, and regulatory factors typical of the food manufacturing industry.

products.name: Kefir
products.description: Cultured dairy beverage product sold to consumers through retail channels.
